description: Input schema for non-combat item use actions

action_schema.target: string — target of the item (self | character_id | object)
action_schema.spell_level: number — for scrolls, the spell level (null otherwise)
action_schema.attunement_required: boolean — whether the item requires attunement
action_schema.charges_remaining: number — current charges (null if not applicable)
action_schema.arcana_roll: number — Arcana check for scroll casting above max spell level (null if not needed)

item_type_rules.potion: Apply effect immediately. Consume item. No check required.
item_type_rules.scroll: Check class spell list. If spell level > max slot level, Arcana check DC 10 + spell level. On fail, scroll destroyed with no effect.
item_type_rules.magic_item: Check attunement (max 3 per PC). Check charges. Apply effect. Decrement charges if applicable.
item_type_rules.mundane: Apply situational effect. Item not consumed unless expendable (torch, oil, rations).
